message:
feat(init): auto-detect dolt server and enable server mode (gt-1mf.3)

When `bd init --backend dolt` is run and a dolt sql-server is already
running on port 3307 or 3306, server mode is automatically enabled.
This makes multi-writer access the default in Gas Town environments
where the dolt server is typically running.

Changes:
- Add DetectRunningServer() function to check common ports
- Auto-enable server mode in init when server detected
- Update help text to document auto-detection behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: gastown/crew/max
Rig: gastown
Role: crew
